resumo: Senior Software Developer with 8 years of experience. Specialized in refactoring, performance, and rendering engineering of web and mobile interfaces, combined with solid backend experience — including API architecture, cloud services, and databases. Experience in team leadership and mentoring developers.

Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS (Amplify, Cognito, S3, SNS, SES, Lambda, Elastic Beanstalk)

practices: Frontend and backend architecture definition, Code refactoring, Performance optimization, Technical documentation and coding standards, Team leadership and management, Mentoring and pair programming, AI-assisted development and agentic engineering (Cursor, Claude Code)

bullets: Building interfaces for a new service order visualization and closure application in the maritime logistics sector using React and an internal UI library. Application built from scratch, recognized by clients for its speed and quality of experience
Implementation and support for a legacy Angular application, including critical bug fixes, new feature additions, and process modernization
Addition of observability tools and build configuration optimization, resulting in a faster download and parse of the final JS bundle, decreasing application startup time by 4 seconds
Development of a social network application for a Catholic audience using React Native and TypeScript, reaching 50,000 downloads

Implementation of complex features: audio and video player, communities system, comments section, push notifications, rich text post creation form (built without external libraries), login, and sign-up flow
Creation of extensive documentation in the repository's README covering code practices, organization, and architecture, reducing task assimilation time between developers
Authorship of business rule documentation, streamlining communication across teams

Migration from a legacy Amplify + AppSync environment to NestJS + Prisma for improved scalability, involving complex APIs, queue integration, DynamoDB, and Lambda functions for critical services connected to AWS triggers
Use of AWS S3, SNS, Cognito, RDS, SES, and Elastic Beanstalk
Use of PaaS platforms for staging APIs such as Heroku and Render
Automated CI/CD pipeline for React Native using CodeMagic

After 18 months, management of a 5-developer team: creation and assignment of tasks on the board, facilitation of communication between the tech team and other departments, 1:1 meetings, and translation of business requirements into technical tasks
Development of an coupon app for a São Paulo shopping mall network, surpassing 100,000 downloads on the Play Store
Implementation of performant lists using FlatList, getItemLayout, maxToRenderPerBatch, and infinite pagination
Assistance to less experienced developers through pair programming sessions, helping them become familiar with React Native and introducing code best practices
Work on an internal management tool using Angular
Creation of UI components based on prototypes, with addition of props to handle design variations and minimize the need for custom CSS
Refactoring of the application using the newly created components, drastically reducing code duplication

Refactoring of the side navigation bar: implementation as a container independent from the main content. During resizing, application of a blur effect to the rest of the interface, with updates only triggered after the action was completed—eliminating visual jank caused by animations based on margin and width
Documentation of implemented solutions for team reference
Prototyping and coding of interfaces for a personal vehicle management app
Complete codebase refactor within one week, assisted by a coworker, resulting in significantly improved maintainability and faster development of new features

Creation of documentation for file and folder organization, naming conventions, and an ESLint rule set—solving the team's main pain point: inconsistencies between different developers' practices. A more homogeneous codebase accelerated the development process
Creation of an animation for an existing logo using After Effects and Lottie, implemented on the product's institutional website
Prototyping and coding of interfaces for a delivery application
Software development for external clients as part of a software services company
